text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Memories of her countless victories start coming
back to me... That's right. Mejiro Palmer does
extremely well in big, festival races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She won the Arima Kinen, the Takarazuka Kinen, and then the Arima Kinen again!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: For real?! I really, seriously won three Grand Prix races in a row?! ME?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Haha! I guess I've done pretty well for myself! But,
it's weird, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Even though it's the same achievement, it's so like
me to go off at the popularity contests.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Guess I'm just built for festival races where
everyone's having a good time!
choice_data_list:
Speaking of festivals, I hear there's going to be
a celebration ceremony.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: For my three wins? Sweet! I love it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Well, I really partied it up at those races, so I
guess I should be chill for the ceremony.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later, at the ceremony rehearsal...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm... That wasn't bad, but the way you carry
yourself on stage could use some improvement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Student Council President Symboli Rudolf looks
critically at Mejiro Palmer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Really? Even the way I'm accepting the trophy is
wrong?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I'm doing anything weird. I'm trying to
be normal, honest...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No, it's not that you're acting weird. You are too
subdued, if anything.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There is no need to hold back. Strut a little. Be
proud of yourself. Winning three Grand Prix races
in a row is a great achievement—one that hasn't
been accomplished since the days of a certain
speedy racer I very much admire.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You... want me to strut? I dunno... Being humble has been ingrained in me since I was little.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... What to do...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: May I offer some advice?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I believe the lack of dignity in your movements
can be attributed to the angle of your head.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you try changing the position of your
head? Raising it about... 2.85 degrees should be
acceptable.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The position of my head is that important? Hm... I
guess I can't look that impressive if I'm always
bowing to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right, Bourbon! Thanks! I'll try raising my head
a little!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Please do. Seeing you more confident would
make me happy as well.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You are the Umamusume that other front runners
aspire to be, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The ceremony goes off without a hitch, and
then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: GAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh?! Is it just me, or was that a pretty good pace?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: It felt so... easy. What was my time?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: N-no kidding. I wonder what happened?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Is this really just the result of all my training? Or...
choice_data_list: It could be the position of your head!
It could be the position of your head!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The position of my head? Oh right, like at the
ceremony...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Correcting her posture just may have led to a
correction in her frame of mind as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's granted her the self-confidence befitting of a
runner with three consecutive Grand Prix
victories.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Interesting... If my feelings change, my running
changes with it. I guess I need to hold my head
even higher!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All riiight! I'm gonna raise my chin, puff out my
chest, and go for a fourth and fifth win!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Woohooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's overflowing with confidence and it's got her
vibing harder than ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling the pride of having won three consecutive
Grand Prix races, Mejiro Palmer plans to keep the
party going.
